name: Pinnacle Fencing, LLC
notes: Issues: very few internal pages (0 — thin site); very few images (0 — minimal visual content); no contact form found; weak or missing CTA language; very small page (2372 bytes — minimal content). Rating: POOR (score 84)

review_snippets.name: Beth S.
review_snippets.text:
Highly recommend Justin and his crew.  He presents himself very professionally, and provided a fair, fully-informed bid including materials used, not just a simple price per foot. Pinnacle also offers a very generous workmanship warranty.  No regrets!

6 mo UPDATE!  Needed to add

review_snippets.name: Amanda S.
review_snippets.text:
Just had a privacy fence installed by Pinnacle Fencing LLC and I couldn’t be happier with the results! 🙌
From start to finish, their team was professional, responsive, and incredibly easy to work with. They showed up when they said they would, kept everything clean and organized,

review_snippets.name: Evan P.
review_snippets.text: We had a perfect experience with Justin and his team in constructing a wood fence along our inclined driveway. They were responsive and worked with us to customize the project to fit our exact needs. I cannot recommend Pinnacle enough.

review_snippets.name: Gray I.
review_snippets.text: Pinnacle Fencing was able to quote us and quickly put up our new fence with 6 foot gate. We would recommend them to anyone! Justin's communication is wonderful and his team is very efficient!

review_snippets.name: Taylor S.
review_snippets.text: Pinnacle Fencing built a beautiful 8’ shadow box privacy fence at my home and were fantastic start to finish!
